summary.lv: Datu inženieris Accenture Baltics, kas projektē un uztur mērogojamus datu konveijerus ar tādiem rīkiem kā Apache Spark un Kafka uz AWS/Azure/GCP, izmantojot Python/Scala/Java un SQL relāciju un lielo datu krātuvēs.
summary.en: Data Engineer at Accenture Baltics designing and maintaining scalable data pipelines with tools like Apache Spark and Kafka on AWS/Azure/GCP, using Python/Scala/Java and SQL across relational and big-data stores.
